title: Hiking Trail Website with FastAPI and Leaflet
pattern: Created a FastAPI backend with proper router/service separation following internal guidelines, implemented OAuth2 security, and built a frontend with Leaflet maps using Dark Slate Gray branding and semantic HTML5 trail articles.

title: Hiking Trails Website with Mapbox/Leaflet Integration
trigger: build hiking trail website with maps
pattern: Created a FastAPI backend with proper router/service separation and OAuth2 security, plus a frontend using Leaflet with Mapbox tiles for displaying hiking trails from GPX files. Implemented semantic HTML5 articles for trail entries and used the required CSS variables for branding.
